case_title: RING, DONALD A., AS TRUSTEE IN BANKRUPTCY FOR vs. GIBBONS, HENRY

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RING, DONALD A., AS TRUSTEE IN BANKRUPTCY FOR 745 SUTTER STREET ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA        LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIBBONS, HENRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 903 PINE ST #23, LEASE FORFEITED
